claim: A 2015 Science study estimated 8 million metric tons of plastic enter the oceans annually, with 90 percent from 10 rivers in Asia and Africa, and this figure could triple by 2040.

source.title: Plastic waste inputs from land into the ocean

method: Reviewed plastic-leakage estimation methodology, river-plume transport, and projections.
limitations: Plastic-leakage estimates are modeled, not directly measured.
